_meta.description: Expanded record type registry covering all document types in aerospace CNC manufacturing QMS. Extends the original 11 types from counters/_registry.json with production, engineering, logistics, HR, admin, and finance record types.

NCR.label: Non-Conformity Report
NCR.label_vi: Phieu bao loi khong phu hop
NCR.description: Documents product, process, or system nonconformance requiring disposition and corrective action

CAPA.label: Corrective & Preventive Action
CAPA.label_vi: Hanh dong khac phuc phong ngua
CAPA.description: Corrective and preventive action linked to NCR, audit finding, or customer complaint

FAI.label: First Article Inspection
FAI.label_vi: Kiem tra san pham dau tien
FAI.description: AS9102-compliant first article inspection for new part, revision, or process change

TRN.label: Training Event
TRN.description: Training session record including attendance, competency assessment, and sign-off

AUD.label: Audit
AUD.label_vi: Danh gia noi bo / ben ngoai
AUD.description: Internal or external audit finding report with corrective action linkage

ECR.label: Engineering Change Request
ECR.label_vi: Yeu cau thay doi ky thuat
ECR.description: Formal request for engineering change to part, process, tooling, or documentation

IMP.label: Improvement Project
IMP.description: Continual improvement project tracked through PDCA cycle

MR.label: Management Review
MR.description: Periodic management review meeting record per ISO 9001 clause 9.3

RISK.label: Risk Review
RISK.description: Risk assessment and review record per ISO 9001 clause 6.1

CAL.label: Calibration Record
CAL.description: Calibration record for measurement equipment including certificate and result tracking

SCAR.label: Supplier Corrective Action Report
SCAR.label_vi: Hanh dong khac phuc nha cung cap
SCAR.description: Supplier corrective action report for incoming quality or delivery nonconformance

DOWNTIME.label: Downtime Record
DOWNTIME.description: Machine downtime event record for OEE tracking and maintenance analysis

PO-EXCEPTION.label: Purchase Order Exception
PO-EXCEPTION.description: Purchase order exception or deviation requiring supply chain approval

RMA.label: Return Material Authorization
RMA.description: Authorization for return of nonconforming material to supplier or from customer

NPI.label: New Product Introduction
NPI.description: New product introduction tracking from quotation through first production run

CONCESSION.label: Concession / Use-As-Is
CONCESSION.description: Authorization to use or release product that does not conform to specified requirements

DEVIATION.label: Process Deviation
DEVIATION.description: Temporary deviation from established process, material, or specification with documented justification

REWORK.label: Rework Authorization
REWORK.description: Authorization and instruction for rework of nonconforming product to meet specifications

CUSTOMER-COMPLAINT.label: Customer Complaint
CUSTOMER-COMPLAINT.description: Customer complaint record requiring investigation, response, and corrective action

SUPPLIER-AUDIT.label: Supplier Audit
SUPPLIER-AUDIT.description: Supplier quality audit record including findings, score, and approval status

PART-NUMBER.label: Part Number Registration
PART-NUMBER.description: Unique part number assignment for new manufactured or purchased components

TOOL-NUMBER.label: Tool Number Registration
TOOL-NUMBER.description: Unique tool number for cutting tools, holders, and tooling assemblies

GAGE-NUMBER.label: Gage Number Registration
GAGE-NUMBER.description: Unique gage/measurement equipment number for calibration tracking and traceability

FIXTURE-NUMBER.label: Fixture Number Registration
FIXTURE-NUMBER.description: Unique fixture/jig number for workholding devices used in CNC machining

WORK-INSTRUCTION-NUMBER.label: Work Instruction
WORK-INSTRUCTION-NUMBER.description: Controlled work instruction document number for operator-level procedures

SOP-NUMBER.label: Standard Operating Procedure
SOP-NUMBER.description: Controlled SOP document number for department-level procedures

ANNEX-NUMBER.label: Annex / Supporting Document
ANNEX-NUMBER.label_vi: Phu luc / Tai lieu ho tro
ANNEX-NUMBER.description: Controlled annex document number for supporting references and appendices

JD-NUMBER.label: Job Description
JD-NUMBER.description: Controlled job description document for each role in the organization

PM-ORDER.label: Preventive Maintenance Order
PM-ORDER.description: Scheduled preventive maintenance work order for CNC machines and equipment

CM-ORDER.label: Corrective Maintenance Order
CM-ORDER.description: Unplanned corrective maintenance work order for equipment breakdown or failure

SPARE-PART.label: Spare Part Request
SPARE-PART.description: Request for spare parts or maintenance consumables for equipment repair

MSA.label: Measurement System Analysis
MSA.description: Gage R&R and measurement system analysis study per AIAG MSA requirements

SPC-STUDY.label: SPC Study
SPC-STUDY.description: Statistical process control study for process capability (Cp/Cpk) and control chart analysis

PFMEA.label: Process FMEA
PFMEA.description: Process failure mode and effects analysis for risk assessment of manufacturing operations

CONTROL-PLAN.label: Control Plan
CONTROL-PLAN.description: Control plan defining inspection methods, frequencies, and reaction plans for each process step

MATERIAL-CERT.label: Material Certificate
MATERIAL-CERT.description: Material test report / mill certificate tracking for incoming raw material traceability

SHIPPING-RELEASE.label: Shipping Release
SHIPPING-RELEASE.description: Authorization to ship completed product including packing list, COC, and delivery note

RECEIVING-RECORD.label: Receiving Record
RECEIVING-RECORD.description: Incoming material receiving record including IQC result and storage location

EHS-INCIDENT.label: EHS Incident Report
EHS-INCIDENT.label_vi: Bao cao su co an toan
EHS-INCIDENT.description: Environmental health and safety incident report including near-miss and accident records

DOC-CHANGE.label: Document Change Notice
DOC-CHANGE.label_vi: Thong bao thay doi tai lieu
DOC-CHANGE.description: Formal notice of change to controlled QMS document requiring review and distribution

NC-PROGRAM.label: NC Program Registration
NC-PROGRAM.description: CNC program version registration linking part number, operation, and program revision

COST-ESTIMATE.label: Cost Estimate
COST-ESTIMATE.label_vi: Bao gia / Du toan chi phi
COST-ESTIMATE.description: Manufacturing cost estimate for quotation including material, labor, overhead, and margin

INTERNAL-AUDIT-PLAN.label: Internal Audit Plan
INTERNAL-AUDIT-PLAN.label_vi: Ke hoach danh gia noi bo
INTERNAL-AUDIT-PLAN.description: Annual or periodic internal audit schedule and plan per ISO 9001 clause 9.2

EMPLOYEE-COMPETENCY.label: Employee Competency Record
EMPLOYEE-COMPETENCY.label_vi: Ho so nang luc nhan vien
EMPLOYEE-COMPETENCY.description: Individual employee competency matrix tracking skills, certifications, and training history
